body.title: UnseenUniversity gets its own Postgres DB + shared coding subagent pattern
body.text:
# D-datacenter-agent-infra-2026-05-05
**title:** UnseenUniversity gets its own Postgres DB + shared coding subagent pattern
**date:** 2026-05-05
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-adc-db-provision, T-adc-db-proxy-wire, T-cc-minion-palace-rule, T-coding-subagent-igor-path

## Decision narrative
UnseenUniversity gets its own Postgres database (`agent-datacenter-0001`) within the same Postgres instance as Igor (one process, multiple databases), with a separate `datacenter` role and credentials. This gives clean identity separation — Igor's credentials cannot touch datacenter tables. Same memory schema shape as Igor's palace. No Igor dependency for any datacenter operation.

Separately: the CC minion pattern (worktree-isolated Agent for mechanical code edits) is formalized as the standard path. Igor-coding is last — all other tickets close before touching Igor cognition. The Igor→coding-subagent invocation mechanism is deferred to T-coding-subagent-igor-path.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-05-06T00:09:46.668954+00:00
**Ticket count:** 2 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-adc-db-provision (S) — CLOSED: Provision agent-datacenter-0001 Postgres DB + datacenter role + schema  `done` — agent-datacenter-0001 created: datacenter role + memory_palace + memories tables. Verified via psql connection.
- T-adc-db-proxy-wire (S) — DESIGNED: Add make_dc_proxy() to UnseenUniversity; wire AGENT_DATACENTER_DB_URL  `done` — make_dc_proxy() in UnseenUniversity/db.py (self-contained, no TheIgors imports per CLAUDE.md rule). AGENT_DATACENTER_DB_URL wired. 4 new tests pass. commit dc33966.

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
